facts.statement: The product is an AI voice cosplay and roleplay experience built around acting inside a story.
facts.source: Product team brief supplied in this project, 2026-07-20

facts.statement: Each playable experience starts from an existing story plot rather than an empty chat box.
facts.source: Product team brief supplied in this project, 2026-07-20

facts.statement: Players choose which available story character they want to perform as.
facts.source: Product team brief supplied in this project, 2026-07-20

facts.statement: The team has previously built AI interactive-fiction and simulator experiences.
facts.source: Product team brief supplied in this project, 2026-07-20

constraints: Do not claim that the product is free, real-time, unlimited, private, or available on a specific platform unless a new approved fact confirms it.
Do not invent player counts, testimonials, rankings, retention, pricing, latency, voice technology, or safety guarantees.
Do not use unlicensed entertainment characters, worlds, trademarks, or recognizable third-party IP.
Do not imply that a feature is already shipped when the approved facts only describe the product direction.
